pre_persona_output:
=== STAGE 1 OUTCOME ===
RESULT: FAILED / INCOMPLETE
LAST_LOG: FILE_OP target not found: tests/golden/README.md

[INSTRUCTION]
The task FAILED or was incomplete. Inform the user about the error honestly. Use LAST_LOG as the authoritative failure cause and do not invent a different one. Do not claim success. Do not state that any file was moved, copied, renamed, created, or deleted unless FILE_CHECKER VERIFIED confirmation appears in the scratchpad — tool execution is not the same as verified completion. Do NOT append [ROUTER]. This turn must end here — let the user decide what to do next.
